channel.title: AIツール分析 — 最新アップデート
channel.description: 生成AI・AIエージェントの最新アップデートを随時配信。新機能・料金変更・連携情報など。

item.title: GitHub: Track total merges by adoption phase in enterprise and organization reports
item.description: Building on the AI adoption phase cohorts added to the Copilot usage metrics API, organization and enterprise reports now report the total number of pull requests merged by each adoption… The post Track total merges by adoption phase in enterprise and organization reports appeared first on The

item.title: GitHub: MAI-Code-1-Flash for Copilot Business and Copilot Enterprise
item.description: MAI-Code-1-Flash, Microsoft AI’s in-house coding model, is now generally available for GitHub Copilot Business and Copilot Enterprise, building on its recent expansion across Copilot surfaces. Purpose-built for coding and optimized… The post MAI-Code-1-Flash for Copilot Business and Copi

item.title: GitHub: GitHub Desktop 3.6: Worktrees and deeper Copilot integration
item.description: GitHub Desktop 3.6 brings more of your day-to-day Git flow into one place with GitHub Copilot now powering commit authoring and merge conflict resolution, plus new Git worktree support. The… The post GitHub Desktop 3.6: Worktrees and deeper Copilot integration appeared first on The GitHub Blog

item.title: OpenAI: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
item.description: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

item.title: GitHub: Copilot code review: Analysis depth and efficiency updates
item.description: Copilot code review now uses the built-in file exploration tools available in the Copilot CLI and SDK, significantly improving review cost efficiency with no change to your existing workflow. If… The post Copilot code review: Analysis depth and efficiency updates appeared first on The GitHub B

item.title: GitHub: Enterprise-managed settings now support strictKnownMarketplaces in VS Code and GitHub Copilot CLI
item.description: Enterprises can now control which plugins their users can install in GitHub Copilot CLI and VS Code. This setting is now available in public preview. Add strictKnownMarketplaces to your enterprise-managed… The post Enterprise-managed settings now support strictKnownMarketplaces in VS Code and

item.title: Google AI: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
item.description: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.

item.title: OpenAI: How agents are transforming work
item.description: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.

item.title: OpenAI: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
item.description: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

item.title: OpenAI: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
item.description: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
